ground_truth.title: Where to Find Affordable Dental Care in Charlotte, NC
ground_truth.author: Adeyemi Niniola
ground_truth.main_content:
Maintaining good oral health is crucial, but the cost of dental care is often a barrier for many people. If you’re in Charlotte, NC, and are looking for affordable dental care, you’re in luck. There are several options available that ensure you can maintain your oral health without breaking the bank. This guide will point you in the right direction for primary and preventive care.

1. Community Health Centers
One of the most accessible and affordable ways to get dental care is through local community health centers. These centers offer a range of dental services, including checkups, cleanings, fillings, and extractions, at a fraction of the cost of private practices.
At C.W. Williams Community Health Center (CWWCHC), we provide high-quality dental services with a focus on accessibility. Our services are designed to meet the needs of families and individuals from all backgrounds, and we offer sliding-scale fees based on income, ensuring everyone has access to the care they need. If you’re worried about the cost, our team can work with you to develop a payment plan that fits your budget.

2. Federally Qualifies Health Centers (FQHCs)
Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs) are another option for affordable dental care in Charlotte. These centers receive government funding to provide services to underserved populations, which allows them to offer lower prices.
FQHCs often provide a wide range of dental services, including preventive care, restorative treatments, and emergency dental care. As part of our commitment to the community, CWWCHC is an FQHC, ensuring that everyone as access to the care they need at affordable prices
Read more: Why Preventive Dental Care Matters: Tips for Long-Term Oral Health

3. Local Health Insurance Programs
If you’re eligible for Medicaid or the Children’s Health Insurance Program (CHIP), you can access dental services at little to no cost. These government programs cover a variety of dental treatments including checkups, cleanings, and even some more complex procedures.
To ensure you’re getting the most out of your coverage, it’s important to check with your provider and ensure that the dental center you choose accepts your insurance. CWWCHC works with most health insurance providers, including Medicaid and Medicare, to provide dental care to eligible patients.

4. Payment Plans and Financing Options
If you require more expensive dental procedures, such as crowns or orthodontics, payment plans and financing options can help you manage the cost. Many dental offices, including CWWCHC, offer flexible payment options to ensure you can access the care you need without financial strain. These plans allow you to spread the cost of treatment over time, making it easier to manage.

5. Discount Dental Plans
If you don’t have dental insurance, discount dental plans can be a great way to save on routine visits and procedures. These plans allow you to pay a monthly fee in exchange for reduced rates on dental care.  At CWWCHC, we offer a sliding scale fee based on income and family size. All you need to provide is some proof, and you are good to go.

Why Choose CWWCHC for your Dental Care?
At CWWCHC, we understand that dental care is key to your overall health, and we aim to make it as affordable and accessible as possible. When it comes to comprehensive dental care, affordability and excellence are at the core of our services. Instead of searching for the “best dentist near me”, simply visit us or give us a call at 980-335-0503. We take pride in delivering top-quality dental care that fits your budget.
Our team is equipped to treat a wide range of dental problems, including:
- Stained teeth
- Toothache
- Enamel erosion
- Tooth decay
- Bad breath
- Cavities
- Tooth and gum sensitivity
- Gum disease
- Additional services
Let us be your trusted partner in maintaining excellent oral health. Book your appointment now to take advantage of our comprehensive dental services.
